docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF KING, KENNETH AS TO DEFENDANT LY-GAGNON, YANN

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-01-2016 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUN-10-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF DOES NOT STIP TO A PRO TEM JUDGE. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-10-2016 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUN-17-2016 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED FEB-13-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LY-GAGNON, YANN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-17-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-17-2016 BY JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: L. FONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY KING, KENNETH AS TO DEFENDANT LY-GAGNON, YANN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-01-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER GRANTING REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-10-2016 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUN-17-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT. 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-17-2016 - JUDGMENT.
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF FILED BY DEFENDANT LY-GAGNON, YANN
DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR, TRAN # W0416815D001, TAG # 034257 BY DEFENDANT LY-GAGNON, YANN
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LY-GAGNON, YANN
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF KING, KENNETH

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KING, KENNETH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LY-GAGNON, YANN $100.00 PRINCIPAL, $55.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $155.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
